lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: Have you come for a particular reason? I am a busy Queen, you know. I had to attend the opening of a new orphanage this morning.

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: And this afternoon I shall be receiving the Embassador of Karamja and accompanying him on his week-long tour of Etceteria.

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: Then this evening we shall be putting on a grand ball! All of the kingdom's nobility will be present!

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: Oh, who am I kidding...nothing ever happens here. I always wanted to be a princess when I was a girl. If I'd been told it would be like this, I wouldn't have bothered.

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: Vargas, you irritating fool. 'Warmongering harpy', indeed!

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: Oh, I apologise. I was merely thinking out loud.

lines.speaker: Queen Sigrid
lines.text: It could be better. Now, if you don't mind, I'm rather busy.
